sections.title: During Making Friends with My Arm
After Making Friends with My Arm

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: How are things at Weiss?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Snowflake and My Arm are ruling the town together, and now I've built them a special fire, they can grow goutweed there.

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: So My Arm taught Weiss the farming knowledge of the Stronghold trolls. Now Stronghold trolls can be given firemaking knowledge from Weiss, like I promised.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Snowflake gave me a book containing all the information she could find from Odd Mushroom's notes.

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: Give it to Burntmeat. He can teach trolls what they want to know from it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hopefully Snowflake will give me another one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now that My Arm has taught the Weiss trolls what he knows about farming, here's a book containing what the Weiss trolls know about firemaking.

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: Odd Mushroom invented lots of clever stuff with Snowflake. Might be handy for Stronghold trolls.

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Let Burntmeat see...

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Uh...

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Yeah, lotsa learnings here. Very clever stuff. We oughta reward you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't give me more burnt meat. I've been here before, and you gave me a load of burnt meat.

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Silly human pretends he don't like Burntmeat's lovely burnt meat! But okay, Burntmeat will not make any more for you. Ever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ever? You're never ever going to give me burnt meat again?

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: No more burnt meat from Burntmeat, ever. Wolfbone here has made reward for you instead.

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: Yes, I have learnt a lot here from my friend Burntmeat, and he has let me prepare a reward for you myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's very kind of you.

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Burntmeat got feeling you no like Burntmeat's burnt meat. Burntmeat made some for you before, an' you not seem grateful. So Burntmeat will not make any more for you. Ever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ever? You're never ever going to give me burnt meat again?

sections.title: After quest and after delivering fire notes

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Ah, you come back again.

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: How are things at Weiss?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Snowflake and My Arm are ruling the town together, and now I've built them a special fire, they can grow goutweed there.

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: I plan to stay here, in the Stronghold, with my friend Burntmeat, but it good to hear of my home. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Stronghold trolls not all that interested in firemaking, after all, but t'anks for bringing book anyway. It taste lovely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ... you're welcome.
